summary: TestGetPostgresProperties is correctly extended with 4 behavioral asserts on the new fields (GucMaxWorkerProcesses, GucMaxParallelWorkers, GucWalSegmentSize, DataDirectory), matching the TDD Anchor and Acceptance Criteria exactly. The asserts pass the litmus test: each verifies that the corresponding scan target populated a non-zero value from live PG, so a scan-arity desync or wrong scan order would be caught here (or panic). max_logical_replication_workers is intentionally not asserted per the task spec (default 4, but 0 acceptable — only scan success matters), which is a documented, correct decision rather than a coverage gap, since scan-arity is still guarded by the full 13-target Scan and Test_CommonQueries. The connect-or-fail pattern (postgres.NewTestConnect + assert.NoError) matches the existing stat-package convention. int64(0) is used for the int64 field, avoiding testify type mismatch. This is a data-plumbing task (read GUCs into a struct, no rendering logic), so live-PG scan verification is the appropriate and sufficient test type.
